character.definition: low-lying area, to accumulate soil; to store up soil
a malignant disease, a chronic disease
(non-classical form of 跈), (same as 踐) to step upon; to tread upon; to trample, (same as 趁) to take advantage, hard to proceeding
to turn on the heel, not moving forward
“ears-out” component used in some Chinese characters (for example, 兑); archaic form of 八; kwukyel, an archaic hanja-based writing system used in Korea before the invention of hangul
dangerous, precarious; high; 12th lunar mansion, determinative star α Aquarii (Sadalmelik)
footwear, shoes; walk on, tread; hexagram ䷉
children's garments. a mat for wrapping garments
